question: What is the correct process to leverage Prompt Builder in a Salesforce org?
options: Select the appropriate prompt template type to use, select one of Salesforce’s standard prompts, determine the object to associate the prompt, select a record to validate against, and associate the prompt to an action.

Select the appropriate prompt template type to use, develop the prompt within the prompt workspace, select resources to dynamically insert CRM-derived grounding data, pick the model to use, and test and validate the generated responses.

Enable the target object for generative prompting, develop the prompt within the prompt workspace, select records to fine-tune and ground the response, enable the Trust Layer, and associate the prompt to an action.
explanation: Prompt Builder requiere desarrollar en el prompt workspace, usar recursos de grounding, seleccionar el modelo y validar los resultados, no solo crear una plantilla. Debe configurarse correctamente para respuestas confiables.

question: An Agentforce Agent has been developed with multiple topics and Agent Actions that use flows and Apex. Which options are available for deploying these to production?
options: Use only change sets because the Salesforce CLI does not currently support the deployment of agent-related metadata.
Deploy flows, Apex, and all agent-related items using either change sets or the Salesforce CLI/Metadata API.
Deploy the flows and Apex using normal deployment tools and manually create the agent-related items in production.
explanation: La opción correcta es usar change sets o Salesforce CLI/Metadata API para desplegar flows, Apex y metadatos de Agentforce de manera consistente. Esto automatiza el despliegue y evita trabajos manuales.

question: Universal Containers (UC) configured a new PDF file ingestion in Data Cloud with all the required fields, and also created the mapping and the search index. UC is now setting up the retriever and notices a required field is missing. How should UC resolve this?
options: Update the search index to include the desired field.
Modify the retriever's configuration to include the desired field.
Create a new custom Data Cloud object that includes the desired field.
explanation: Para resolver un campo requerido faltante, actualice la search index para incluir el campo. El retriever depende de índices configurados; sin el campo indexado, no puede devolver datos necesarios.

question: Universal Containers (UC) users are complaining that agent answers are not satisfactory. The agent is using PDF files as a knowledge source. How should UC troubleshoot this issue?
options: Verify the retriever's filter criteria and data source connection.
Check that the agent has the PDF file field permission access for the data library.
Analyze the data mapping between source fields and Data Cloud object fields.
explanation: Cuando el agente usa PDFs, las respuestas dependen del mapeo de campos de Data Cloud. Revisar mapping y data source es clave para mejorar la precisión antes de cambiar modelos.

question: Universal Containers wants to leverage the Record Snapshots grounding feature in a prompt template. What preparations are required?
options: Configure page layout of the master record type.
Create a field set for all the fields to be grounded.
Enable and configure dynamic form for the object.
explanation: Record Snapshots utiliza field sets para determinar qué campos se incluyen para grounding. Configurar field set es el paso esencial para que la información se rastree correctamente.

question: Universal Containers (UC) wants to enable its sales team with automatic post-call visibility into mention of competitors, products, and other custom phrases. Which feature should the company use to enable the sales team?
options: Call Insights
Call Explorer
Call Summaries
explanation: Call Insights provee visibilidad post-llamada sobre menciones de competidores, productos y frases personalizadas para mejorar la captación y seguimiento de oportunidades.

question: An Agentforce Specialist is setting up a new org and needs to ensure that users can create and execute prompt templates. The specialist is unsure which roles are necessary. Which permission sets should be assigned?
options: Prompt Template Manager for creating templates and Prompt Template User for executing templates.
Prompt Template Manager for creating templates and Data Cloud Admin for executing templates.
Data Cloud Admin for creating templates and Prompt Template User for executing templates.
explanation: Prompt Template Manager crea y administra plantillas; Prompt Template User permite ejecutar las plantillas. Asignar ambos es la práctica de permisos correcta para creación y ejecución.

question: What considerations should an Agentforce Specialist be aware of when using Record Snapshots grounding in a prompt template?
options: Activities such as tasks and events are excluded.
Email addresses associated with the object are excluded.
Empty data, such as fields without values or sections without limits, is filtered out.
explanation: Record Snapshots filtra datos vacíos y solo incluye campos con valores. Esto asegura que el grounding sea relevante y sin ruido para el modelo generativo.

question: Universal Containers (UC) wants its AI agent to return responses quickly. UC needs to optimize the retriever's configuration to ensure minimal latency when grounding AI responses. Which configuration aspect should UC prioritize?
options: Increase the recency bias setting for the retriever limiting scope to more recent data.
Ensure the retriever’s filters are defined to limit the scope of each search efficiently.
Configure the retriever to operate in dynamic mode so that it modifies the search index structure at runtime.
explanation: Para minimizar latencia, priorice filtros retriever que reduzcan el scope de búsqueda. Esto limita datos irrelevantes y acelera la recuperación del contenido grounding.

question: A support team handles a high volume of chat interactions and needs a solution to provide quick, relevant responses to customer inquiries. Responses must be grounded in the organization's knowledge base. Which feature should the support team use?
options: Einstein Knowledge Recommendations
Einstein Service Replies
Einstein Reply Recommendations
explanation: Einstein Service Replies es la función de respuesta IA para chats de servicio, basada en Knowledge. Permite respuestas rápidas y alineadas con la base de conocimiento de la empresa.

question: How does the AI retriever function within Data Cloud?
options: It automatically extracts and reformats raw data from diverse sources into standardized datasets for use in historical trend analysis and forecasting.
It monitors and aggregates data quality metrics across various data pipelines to ensure only high-integrity data is used for strategic decision-making.
It performs contextual searches over an indexed repository to quickly fetch the most relevant documents, enabling grounding AI responses with trustworthy, verifiable information.
explanation: El retriever hace búsquedas contextuales sobre datos indexados en Data Cloud para traer documentos grounded. Es la pieza clave para entregar información verificable a la IA.

question: How is Data Cloud leveraged by the Answer Questions with Knowledge action in Agentforce?
options: Data Cloud stores and manages the indexed Knowledge articles.
Data Cloud is not required; the articles can be accessed directly from the CRM by the agent.
Data Cloud provides the real-time data streams that update the Knowledge articles.
explanation: Data Cloud se usa para almacenar y gestionar artículos de Knowledge indexados que el agente usa para respuestas fundamentadas; es el repositorio de contenido de Knowledge.

question: What is true of Agentforce Testing Center?
options: Running tests risks modifying CRM data in a production environment.
Running tests does not consume Einstein Requests.
Agentforce Testing Center can only be used in a production environment.
explanation: El Testing Center puede modificar datos si se prueban en producción, lo que implica un riesgo real. Por eso, use sandbox o datos de prueba para pruebas de agente.

question: Universal Containers (UC) has a legacy system that needs to integrate with Salesforce. UC wishes to create a digest of account action plans using the generative API feature. Which API service should UC use to meet this requirement?
options: REST API
Metadata API
SOAP API
explanation: Para generar digest con la API generativa, use REST API. Metadata y SOAP son usados para metadatos y SOAP integration, no para generación de contenido AI.

question: Universal Containers recently added a custom flow for processing returns and created a new Agent Action. Which action should the company take to ensure the Agentforce Service Agent can run this new flow as part of the new Agent Action?
options: Assign the Manage Users permission to the Agentforce Agent user.
Assign the Run Flows permission to the Agentforce Agent user.
Recreate the flow using the Agentforce Agent user.
explanation: Asignar Run Flows al Agentforce user es esencial para ejecutar flujos desde un Agent Action. Sin este permiso, la acción falla en ejecución.

question: Universal Containers (UC) wants to build an Agentforce Service Agent that provides the latest, active, and relevant policy and compliance information to customers. The agent must: ● Semantically search HR policies, compliance guidelines, and company procedures ● Ensure responses are grounded on published Knowledge ● Allow Knowledge updates to be reflected immediately without manual reconfiguration What should UC do to ensure the agent retrieves the right information?
options: Set up an Agentforce Data Library to store and index policy documents for AI retrieval.
Enable the agent to search all internal records and past customer inquiries.
Manually add policy responses into the AI model to prevent hallucinations.
explanation: Crear una Data Library indexada permite búsquedas semánticas y grounding de políticas y contenido. Esto asegura que las respuestas sean precisas y actualizadas.

question: Based on the user utterance, “Show me all the customers in New York”, which standard Agent action will the planner service use?
options: Select Records
Query Records
Fetch Records
explanation: Query Records es la acción que el planner selecciona para solicitudes de listado como 'Show me all customers'. Asegura recuperación de registros relevantes.

question: Universal Containers (UC) has configured Agentforce Data Library using Knowledge articles. When testing in Agent Builder and the Experience Cloud site, the agent is not responding with grounded Knowledge article information. However, when tested in Prompt Builder, the response returns correctly. What should UC do to troubleshoot the issue?
options: Ensure the assigned User permission set includes access to the prompt template used to access the Knowledge articles.
Create a new permission set that assigns “Manage Knowledge” and assign it to the Agentforce Service Agent User.
Ensure the Data Cloud User permission set has been assigned to the Agentforce Service Agent User.
explanation: Debe asignarse el Data Cloud User permission set para que el Service Agent acceda a la Data Library y recupere artículos de Knowledge en el agente.

question: A sales manager needs to contact leads at scale with hyper-relevant solutions and customized communications in the most efficient manner possible. Which Salesforce solution best suits this need?
options: Einstein Sales Assistant
Prompt Builder
Einstein Lead follow-up
explanation: Einstein Sales Assistant ofrece capacidades de outreach a escala con mensajes personalizados y recomendaciones para leads. Es la solución adecuada para el caso de uso de contactación masiva.

question: An Agentforce Service Agent, who has been successfully assisting customers with service requests in Salesforce, is now unable to help customers with issues related to a new product replacement process. The company recently implemented a custom Product Replacement object. Which change must be implemented?
options: The profile assigned to the Agentforce Agent User needs AI training permission to the custom object.
The permission set assigned to the Agent User needs Read access to the custom object.
The permission set group assigned to the Agent User needs to grant access to the Product Replacement flow.
explanation: Para que el agente pueda consultar el objeto custom de reemplazo de producto, el permission set debe incluir acceso Read a ese objeto.

question: Universal Containers deployed the new Agentforce Sales Development Representative (SDR) into production, but sales reps are saying they can't find it. What is causing this issue?
options: Sales rep users do not have access to the SDR Agent object.
Sales rep users profiles are missing the Allow SDR Agent permission.
Sales rep users are missing the Use SDR Agent permission set.
explanation: La causa habitual es no asignar el permission set Use SDR Agent. Sin ese permiso, los reps no pueden ver o usar el agente.

question: An Agentforce Specialist is creating a custom action for Agentforce. Which setting should the Agentforce Specialist test and iterate on to ensure the action performs as expected?
options: Action Instructions
Action Name
Action Input
explanation: Action Instructions son la configuración clave para iterar y validar el comportamiento de una acción. Ajustarlas permite mejorar la precisión del flow y los outcomes.

question: What is the role of the large language model (LLM) in understanding intent and executing an Agent Action?
options: Determine a user's topic access and sort actions by priority to be executed
Identify the best matching topic and actions and correct order of execution
Find similar requested topics and provide the actions that need to be executed
explanation: El LLM identifica el topic y la acción correcta en base a la intención del usuario, y ordena los pasos para ejecutar la respuesta adecuada.

question: An administrator wants to check the response of the Flex prompt template they've built, but the preview button is greyed out. What is the reason for this?
options: The prompt has not been saved and activated.
The records related to the prompt have not been selected.
A merge field has not been inserted in the prompt.
explanation: Si el botón de preview está gris, el template no se ha guardado o activado. Debe guardarse y activarse para que la vista previa funcione.

question: Universal Containers (UC) wants to enable its sales reps to explore opportunities that are similar to previously won opportunities by entering the utterance, “Show me other opportunities like this one.” How should UC achieve this with Agents?
options: Create a custom Agent action calling an Apex class.
Use the standard Agent action.
Create a custom Agent action calling a flow.
explanation: Use la acción estándar para buscar oportunidades similares; esto simplifica el workflow y aprovecha la funcionalidad existente sin custom Apex/Flow.

question: When a customer chat is initiated, which functionality in Salesforce provides generative AI replies or draft emails based on recommended Knowledge articles?
options: Einstein Reply Recommendations
Einstein Service Replies
Einstein Grounding
explanation: Einstein Service Replies genera respuestas basadas en artículos de Knowledge durante el chat.

question: Universal Containers wants to allow its service agents to query the current fulfillment status of an order with natural language. There is an existing autolaunched flow to query the information from Oracle ERP, which is the system of record for the order fulfillment process. How should an Agentforce Specialist apply the power of conversational AI to this use case?
options: Create a custom Agent action which calls a flow.
Create a Flex prompt template in Prompt Builder.
Configure the Integration Flow Standard Action in Agent Builder.
explanation: Use un custom Agent action para invocar el flow autolaunch desde ERP.

question: Universal Containers is planning a marketing email about products that most closely match a customer's expressed interests. What should the company use to generate this email?
options: Custom sales email template which is grounded with interest and product information
Standard email marketing template using Apex or flows for matching interest in products
Standard email draft with Einstein and choose standard email template
explanation: Use plantilla de email de ventas personalizada con grounding e intereses.

question: Universal Containers has seen a high adoption rate of a new feature that uses generative AI to populate a summary field of a custom object, Competitor Analysis. All sales users have the same profile but one user cannot see the generative AI-enabled field icon next to the summary field. What is the most likely cause of the issue?
options: The user does not have the field Generative AI User permission set assigned.
The prompt template associated with summary field is not activated for that user.
The user does not have the Prompt Template User permission set assigned.
explanation: Para ver el icono de generative field, el usuario necesita Prompt Template User permission set.

question: Once a data source is chosen for an Agentforce Data Library, what is true about changing that data source later?
options: The Data Retriever can be reconfigured to use a different data source.
The data source can be changed through the Data Cloud settings.
The data source cannot be changed after it is selected.
explanation: No se puede cambiar la fuente de datos después de seleccionar la data source.

question: Universal Containers (UC) wants to use Flow to bring data from unified Data Cloud objects to prompt templates. Which type of flow should UC use?
options: Template-triggered prompt flow
Data Cloud-triggered flow
Unified-object linking flow
explanation: Use un template-triggered prompt flow para llevar datos a plantillas de prompts.

question: Before activating a custom Agent action, an Agentforce Specialist would like to understand multiple real-world user utterances to ensure the action is being selected appropriately. Which tool should the Agentforce Specialist recommend?
options: Agent Builder
Model Playground
Agentforce
explanation: Agent Builder permite analizar utterances reales antes de activar acciones.

question: Which scenario best demonstrates when an Agentforce Data Library is most useful for improving an AI agent's response accuracy?
options: When data is being retrieved from Snowflake using zero-copy for vectorization and retrieval.
When the AI agent must provide answers based on a curated set of policy documents that are stored, regularly updated, and indexed in the data library.
When the AI agent needs to combine data from disparate sources based on mutually common data.
explanation: Data Library es ideal para documentos de políticas curados y indexados para grounding.

question: Which object stores the conversation transcript between the customer and the agent?
options: Case
Messaging End User
Messaging Session
explanation: Messaging Session guarda la transcripción de la conversación.

question: Universal Containers implements three custom actions to get three distinct types of sales summaries for its users. Users are complaining that they are not getting the right summary based on their utterances. What should the Agentforce Specialist investigate as the root cause?
options: Review the Action Instructions to ensure they are unique.
Review that the custom action is assigned to an Agent.
Ensure the input and output types are correctly chosen.
explanation: Revise Action Instructions para acciones distintas y desambiguar resultados.

question: Universal Containers’ Agent Action includes several Apex classes for the new Agentforce Agent. What is an important consideration when deploying Apex that is invoked by an Agent Action?
options: Apex classes invoked by an Agent Action may be deployed with less than 75% test coverage as long as the agent is not activated in production.
The Apex classes must have at least 75% code coverage from unit tests, and all dependencies must be in the deployment package.
The Apex classes may bypass the 75% code coverage requirement as long as they are only used by the agent.
explanation: Apex invocado por Agent Action requiere 75% cobertura y todas las dependencias en despliegue.

question: Universal Containers tests out a new Einstein Generative AI feature for its sales team to create personalized and contextualized emails for its customers. Sometimes, users find that the draft email contains placeholders for attributes that could have been derived from the recipient's contact record. What is the most likely explanation for why the draft email shows these placeholders?
options: The user does not have Einstein Sales Emails permission assigned.
The user does not have permission to access the fields.
The user's locale language is not supported by Prompt Builder.
explanation: Uso de marcadores de posición indica que el usuario no tiene acceso a los campos.

question: Amid their busy schedules, sales reps at Universal Containers dedicate time to follow up with prospects and existing clients via email regarding renewals or new deals. They spend many hours reviewing past communications and details about their customers before performing outreach. Which standard Agent action helps draft personalized emails to prospects by generating text based on previous successful communications?
options: Agent Action: Draft or Revise Sales Email
Agent Action: Find Similar Opportunities
Agent Action: Summarize Record
explanation: Draft or Revise Sales Email genera emails personalizados de comunicaciones previas.

question: Leadership needs to populate a dynamic form field with a summary or description created by a large language model (LLM) to facilitate more productive conversations with customers. Leadership also wants to keep a human in the loop. Which prompt template type should the Agentforce Specialist recommend?
options: Field Generation
Record Summary
Sales Email
explanation: Field Generation es el tipo de prompt adecuado para generar texto con control humano.

question: Universal Containers wants its AI agent to answer customer questions with precise and up-to-date information. How does an Agentforce Data Library simplify and enable this?
options: It automates the ingestion and optical character recognition (OCR) processing of any PDF and indexes them to enable SQL query retrieval.
It automates the ingestion, indexing of data, and creates a default retriever to be used in prompts and agents for grounding with relevant information.
It automates the ingestion, taxonomical classification and storage of knowledge for keyword search retrieval.
explanation: Data Library automatiza ingestión, indexación y crea retriever para grounding.

question: An Agentforce Specialist is tasked to optimize a business process flow by assigning actions to agents within the Salesforce Agentforce Platform. What is the correct method for the Agentforce Specialist to assign actions to an Agent?
options: Assign the action to a Topic first on Action Builder.
Assign the action to a Topic first in Agent Builder.
Assign the action to a Topic first on the Agent Actions detail page.
explanation: Asigne la acción en la página de detalles de Agent Actions y luego al topic.

question: Universal Containers (UC) wants to ensure the effectiveness, reliability, and trust of its agents prior to deploying them in production. UC would like to efficiently test a large and repeatable number of utterances. What should the Agentforce Specialist recommend?
options: Deploy the agent in a QA sandbox environment and review the Utterance Analysis reports.
Create a CSV file with UC's test cases in Agentforce Testing Center using the testing template.
Leverage the Agent Large Language Model (LLM) UI and test with different utterances.
explanation: Use CSV de casos de prueba en Agentforce Testing Center para pruebas repetibles.

question: What is the primary function of the reasoning engine in Agentforce?
options: Generating record queries based on conversation history
Identifying agent topics and actions to respond to user utterances
Offering real-time natural language responses during conversations
explanation: El reasoning engine identifica topics y acciones adecuados para una utterance.

question: Universal Containers (UC) currently tracks Leads with a custom object. UC is preparing to implement the Sales Development Representative (SDR) Agent. Which consideration should UC keep in mind?
options: Agentforce SDR only works with the standard Lead object.
Agentforce SDR only works on Opportunities.
Agentforce SDR only supports custom objects associated with Accounts.
explanation: SDR Agent solo funciona con el objeto estándar Lead.

question: Universal Containers (UC) wants to make a marketing newsletter and to directly use data from five unrelated objects (two standard and three custom) ina prompt template. How should UC accomplish this?
options: Create a prompt template-triggered flow to access the data from five objects.
Create a prompt template passing in a special custom object.
Create a flex template and use the five objects as inputs.
explanation: Use un flow disparado por plantilla para obtener datos de múltiples objetos.

question: An Agentforce Specialist is tasked with creating a prompt template for a sales team. The template needs to generate a summary of all related opportunities for a given Account. Which grounding technique should the Agentforce Specialist use to include data from the related list of opportunities in the prompt template?
options: Use formula fields to reference the related list.
Use merge fields to reference the default related list of opportunities.
Use merge fields to reference a custom related list.
explanation: Use merge fields para referenciar el related list predeterminado de oportunidades.

question: In the context of retriever and search indexes, what best describes the data preparation process in Data Cloud?
options: Aggregating and normalizing structured datasets
Loading, chunking, vectorizing, and storing content for retrieval
Real-time ingestion without preprocessing
explanation: Data Cloud prepara datos cargando, chunking, vectorizando y almacenando contenido.

question: Universal Containers recently launched a pilot program to integrate conversational AI into its CRM business operations with Agentforce Agents. How should the Agentforce Specialist monitor Agents' usability and the assignment of actions?
options: Run Agent Analytics
Query Agent logs via Metadata API
Use Platform Debug Logs
explanation: Use Agent Analytics para monitorear usabilidad y asignación de acciones.

question: Universal Containers (UC) has implemented Generative AI within Salesforce to enable summarization of a custom object called Guest. Users have reported mismatches in the generated information. In refining its prompt design strategy, which key practices should UC prioritize?
options: Create concise, clear, and consistent prompt templates with effective grounding, contextual role-playing, clear instructions, and iterative feedback.
Enable prompt test mode, allocate different prompt variations to a subset of users for evaluation, and standardize the most effective model based on performance feedback.
Submit a prompt review case to Salesforce and conduct thorough testing in the playground to refine outputs until they meet user expectations.
explanation: Use prompts concisos, claros y grounding fuertes con feedback iterativo.

question: An Agentforce Specialist is trying to set up a new Field Generation prompt template. They take the following steps: 1. Create a new Field Generation prompt template. 2. Choose Case as the object type. 3. Select the custom field AI_Analysis__c as the target field. After creating the prompt template, the Agentforce Specialist saves, tests, and activates it. However, when they go to a case record, the AI Analysis field does not show the ✨ (Sparkle) icon on the Edit pencil. When the Agentforce Specialist was editing the field, it was behaving as a normal field. Which critical step did the Agentforce Specialist miss?
options: They forgot to edit the Lightning page layout and associate the field to a prompt template.
They forgot to reactivate the Lightning page layout for the Case object after activating their Field Generation prompt template.
They forgot that the Case object is not supported for field generation as Einstein Service Replies should be used instead.
explanation: Faltó asociar el campo al prompt template en el layout de Lightning.

question: Universal Containers (UC) implements a custom retriever to improve the accuracy of AI-generated responses. UC notices that the retriever is returning too many irrelevant results, making the responses less useful. What should UC do to ensure only relevant data is retrieved?
options: Define filters to narrow the search results based on specific conditions.
Change the search index to a different data model object (DMO).
Increase the maximum number of results returned to capture a broader dataset.
explanation: Defina filtros para restringir los resultados a datos relevantes.

question: After configuring and saving a Salesforce Agentforce Data Library (regardless of the data source), which components are automatically created and available in Data Cloud?
options: A data pipeline, an indexing engine, and a query processor.
A data connector, an analytics dashboard, and a workflow rule.
A data stream, a search index, and a retriever.
explanation: Crea un data stream, search index y retriever automáticamente.

question: What is the main benefit of using a Knowledge article in an Agentforce Data Library?
options: It provides a structured, searchable repository of approved documents so the agent can retrieve reliable information for each inquiry.
Only the retriever for Knowledge articles allows agents to access Knowledge from both inside the platform and on a customer's website.
The retriever for Knowledge articles has better accuracy and performance than the default retriever.
explanation: Knowledge articles ofrecen repositorio estructurado y confiable para retrieval.

question: A Universal Containers administrator is setting up Einstein Data Libraries. After creating a new library, the administrator notices that only the file upload option is available; there is no option to configure the library using a Salesforce Knowledge base. What is the most likely cause of this issue?
options: Salesforce Knowledge is not enabled in the organization; without Salesforce Knowledge enabled, the Knowledge-based data source option will not be available in Einstein Data Libraries.
The current Salesforce org lacks the necessary Einstein for Service permissions that support the Knowledge-based Data Library option, so only the file upload option is presented.
The administrator is not using Lightning Experience, which is required to display all data source options, including the Knowledge base option, when configuring Einstein Data Libraries.
explanation: Si Knowledge no está habilitado, no aparece la opción de Knowledge-based source.

question: Universal Containers would like to route a service agent conversation to a human agent queue. Which tool connects the service agent to the human agent queue for escalation?
options: Screen Flow
Prompt Flow
Outbound Omni-Channel Flow
explanation: Outbound Omni-Channel Flow conecta el chat con cola de agentes humanos.

question: What is an Agentforce Specialist able to do when the ‘Enrich event logs with conversation data’ setting in the Agentforce configuration is enabled?
options: Generate detailed reports on all Agent conversations over any time period.
View the user click path that led to each Agent action.
View session data including user input and Agent responses for sessions over the past 7 days.
explanation: Permite ver datos de sesión con entradas y respuestas de los últimos 7 días.

question: A sales manager is using Agent Assistant to streamline their daily tasks. They ask the agent to "Show me a list of my open opportunities." How does the large language model (LLM) in Agentforce identify and execute the action to show the sales manager a list of open opportunities?
options: The LLM interprets the user's request, generates a plan by identifying the appropriate topics and actions, and executes the actions to retrieve and display the open opportunities.
Using a dialog pattern, the LLM matches the user query to the available topic, action and steps then performs the steps for each action.
The LLM uses a static set of rules to match the user's request with predefined topics and actions.
explanation: El LLM interpreta la petición, genera plan con topics/actions y ejecuta la acción.

question: Universal Containers plans to enhance the customer support team's productivity using AI. Which specific use case necessitates the use of Prompt Builder?
options: Creating a draft of a support bulletin post for new product patches.
Estimating support ticket volume based on historical data and seasonal trends.
Creating an AI-generated customer support agent performance score.
explanation: Prompt Builder es necesario para generar borradores de contenido con AI.

question: A Salesforce Administrator wants to generate personalized, targeted emails that incorporate customer interaction data. The admin wants to leverage large language models (LLMs) to write the emails, and wants to reuse templates for different products and customers. Which solution approach should the admin leverage?
options: Create a Sales Email prompt template type.
Use Sales Email standard templates.
Create a Field Generation prompt template type.
explanation: Crear plantilla de prompt de Sales Email reutilizable para diferentes clientes.

question: Universal Containers built a Field Generation prompt template that worked for many records, but users are reporting random failures with token limit errors. What is the cause of the random nature of this error?
options: The template type needs to be switched to Flex to accommodate the variable amount of tokens generated by the prompt grounding.
The number of tokens that can be processed by the LLM varies with total user demand.
The number of tokens generated by the dynamic nature of the prompt template will vary by record.
explanation: Los tokens varían por registro, por eso el error es aleatorio.

question:
Universal Containers (UC) wants to use the Draft with Einstein feature in Sales Cloud to create a personalized introduction email.
After creating a proposed draft email, which predefined adjustment should UC choose to revise the draft with a more casual tone?
options: Make Less Formal
Enhance Friendliness
Optimize for Clarity
explanation: Einstein Trust Layer actúa como intermediario entre el LLM y los datos de Salesforce, asegurando que la información sensible sea enmascarada antes de enviarla al modelo y que las respuestas sean auditadas. Esto garantiza privacidad y cumplimiento normativo sin sacrificar la utilidad de la IA.

question: What should an AI Specialist consider when using related list merge fields in a prompt template associated with an Account object in Prompt Builder?
options: The Activities related list on the Account object Is not supported because it is a polymorphic field.
If person accounts have been enabled, merge fields will not be available for the Account object.
Prompt generation will yield no response when there is no related list associated with an Account in runtime.
explanation: Topics en Agentforce definen áreas de conversación y sus instrucciones, mientras que las Actions son las tareas específicas ejecutables dentro de cada topic. Sin Topics bien definidos, el agente no puede enrutar correctamente las solicitudes del usuario a las acciones adecuadas.

question:
An Al Specialist is tasked with configuring a generative model to create personalized sales emails using customer data stored in Salesforce. The AI Specialist has already fine-tuned a large language model (LLM) on the OpenAI platform. Security and data privacy are critical concerns for the client. 
How should the AI Specialist integrate the custom LLM into Salesforce?
options: Create an application of the custom LLM and embed it in Sales Cloud via iFrame.
Add the fine-tuned LLM in Einstein Studio Model Builder.
Enable model endpoint on OpenAl and make callouts to the model to generate emails.
explanation: Flex Templates permiten combinar múltiples recursos y objetos no relacionados como inputs, siendo ideales para casos complejos como propuestas de ventas. Las plantillas estándar están limitadas a un solo objeto, por lo que Flex es la solución correcta para datos de múltiples fuentes.

question:
The sales team at a hotel resort would like to generate a guest summary about the guests' interests and provide recommendations based on their activity preferences captured in each guest profile. They want the summary to be available only on the contact record page. 
Which AI capability should the team use?
options: Einstein Agentforce
Prompt Builder
Model Builder
explanation: El Model Builder permite conectar modelos LLM externos alojados en plataformas como AWS o Azure directamente a Salesforce, sin necesidad de App Builder o Agentforce Builder para esta función específica. Es la herramienta diseñada para gestionar y registrar modelos externos en la plataforma.

question:
An AI Specialist wants to include data from the response of external service invocation (REST API callout) into the prompt template. 
How should the AI Specialist meet this requirement?
options: Convert the JSON to an XML merge field.
Use External Service Record merge fields.
Use “Add Prompt Instructions” flow element.
explanation: Einstein Service Replies genera respuestas sugeridas para chats de servicio al cliente basadas en la base de conocimiento y el contexto del caso. Las otras opciones no están diseñadas específicamente para sugerir respuestas en tiempo real durante conversaciones de chat.

question:
Universal Containers (UC) wants to assess Salesforce's generative Al features but has concerns over its company data being exposed to third party large language models (LLMs). Specifically, UC wants the following capabilities to be part of Einstein's generative AI service.
- No data is used for LLM training or product improvements by third-party LLMs.
- No data is retained outside of UC's Salesforce org.
- The data sent cannot be accessed by the LLM provider.
Which property of the Einstein Trust Layer should the AI Specialist highlight to UC that addresses these requirements?
options: Prompt Defense
Zero-Data Retention Policy
Data Masking
explanation: El Reasoning Engine de Agentforce identifica los topics y actions más relevantes para responder a las solicitudes del usuario, actuando como el cerebro del agente. No genera respuestas directamente ni consulta registros; su función es planificar y orquestar las acciones correctas.

question:
An AI Specialist is creating a custom action in Einstein Agentforce or copilot . 
Which option is available for the AI Specialist to choose for the custom Agentforce or copilot  action?
options: Apex trigger
SOQL
Flows
explanation: Para minimizar la latencia del retriever, priorizar filtros bien definidos que reduzcan el scope de búsqueda es más efectivo que modificar el bias de recencia o usar modo dinámico. Los filtros limitan los datos procesados en cada consulta, optimizando el tiempo de respuesta.

question:
Universal Containers is using Einstein Agentforce or copilot  for Sales to find similar opportunities to help close deals faster. The team wants to understand the criteria used by the Agentforce or copilot  to match opportunities. 
What is one criteria that Einstein Agentforce or copilot  for Sales uses to match similar opportunities?
options: Matched opportunities are limited to the same account.
Matched opportunities were created in the last 12 months.
Matched opportunities have a status of Closed Won from last 12 months.
explanation: Action Instructions son la configuración más crítica para que el agente identifique correctamente cuándo ejecutar cada acción. El nombre y los inputs también importan, pero las instrucciones definen el comportamiento y la lógica de selección de la acción por parte del LLM.

question:
An AI Specialist wants to use the related lists from an account in a custom prompt template. 
What should the AI Specialist consider when configuring the prompt template?
options: The text encoding (for example, UTF-8, ASCII) option
The maximum number of related list merge fields
The choice between XML and JSON rendering formats for the list
explanation: Query Records es la acción estándar del planner para solicitudes que implican listar o buscar registros según criterios como ubicación o tipo. Select Records y Fetch Records no son las acciones estándar para este tipo de consulta en el catálogo de Agentforce.

question: Which use case is best supported by Salesforce Einstein Agentforce or copilot 's capabilities?
options: Bring together a conversational interface for interacting with AI for all Salesforce users, such as developers and ecommerce retailers.
Enable Salesforce admin users to create and train custom large language models (LLMs) using CRM data.
Enable data scientists to train predictive AI models with historical CRM data using built-in machine learning capabilities.
explanation: Messaging Session es el objeto que almacena la transcripción completa de conversaciones entre clientes y agentes de mensajería. Case almacena la solicitud de soporte y Messaging End User identifica al cliente, pero la transcripción vive en Messaging Session.

question:
An AI Specialist wants to ground a new prompt template with the User related list.
What should the AI Specialist consider?
options: The User related list should have View All access.
The User related list needs to be included on the record page.
The User related list is not supported in prompt templates.
explanation: La función principal del reasoning engine es identificar los topics y actions correctos para responder a las utterances del usuario, no generar respuestas directamente. Es el orquestador que decide qué capacidades del agente activar en cada interacción.

question:
Universal Containers implements Custom Agentforce or copilot  Actions to enhance its customer service operations. The development team needs to understand the core components of a Custom Agentforce or copilot  Action to ensure proper configuration and functionality.
What should the development team review in the Custom Agentforce or copilot  Action configuration to identify one of the core components of a Custom Agentforce or copilot  Action?
options: Instructions
Output Types
Action Triggers
explanation: Para que el Agentforce Service Agent acceda a la Data Library y recupere artículos de Knowledge, se debe asignar el permiso Data Cloud User al usuario del agente. Sin este permiso set, el agente no puede conectarse a Data Cloud aunque Prompt Builder funcione correctamente con otro usuario.

question:
An AI Specialist at Universal Containers is working on a prompt template to generate personalized emails for product demonstration requests from customers. It is important for the Al-generated email to adhere strictly to the guidelines, using only associated opportunity information, and to encourage the recipient to take the desired action.
How should the AI Specialist include these instructions on a new line in the prompt template?
options: Surround them with triple quotes (""").
Make sure merged fields are defined.
Use curly brackets {} to encapsulate instructions.
explanation: Configurar una Agentforce Data Library con los documentos de política indexados permite búsquedas semánticas y grounding de respuestas con contenido actualizado. Esto garantiza que el agente devuelva información precisa y que las actualizaciones de Knowledge se reflejen automáticamente.

question:
Universal Containers is interested in improving the sales operation efficiency by analyzing their data using Al-powered predictions in Einstein Studio. 
Which use case works for this scenario?
options: Predict customer sentiment toward a promotion message.
Predict customer lifetime value of an account.
Predict most popular products from new product catalog.
explanation: Prompt Template Manager es el permission set para crear y administrar plantillas, mientras que Prompt Template User permite ejecutarlas. Asignar ambos roles correctamente garantiza que los usuarios puedan tanto crear como ejecutar prompt templates según sus necesidades.

question:
Universal Containers wants to use an external large language model (LLM) in Prompt Builder.
What should an AI Specialist recommend?
options: Use Apex to connect to an external LLM and ground the prompt.
Use BYO-LLM functionality in Einstein Studio,
Use Flow and External Services to bring data from an external LLM.
explanation: Field Generation es el tipo de prompt template diseñado para poblar campos de formularios dinámicos con contenido generado por LLM, manteniendo al humano en el proceso de aprobación. Record Summary y Sales Email tienen propósitos distintos y no están orientados a campos individuales en formularios.

question:
The marketing team at Universal Containers is looking for a way to personalize emails based on customer behavior, preferences, and purchase history.
Why should the team use Einstein Agentforce or copilot  as the solution?
options: To generate relevant content when engaging with each customer
To analyze past campaign performance
To send automated emails to all customers
explanation: Call Insights proporciona visibilidad post-llamada sobre menciones de competidores, productos y frases personalizadas configurables. Esta función está diseñada específicamente para analizar conversaciones de ventas y extraer insights relevantes de manera automática.

question:
Universal Containers has an active standard email prompt template that does not fully deliver on the business requirements. 
Which steps should an AI Specialist take to use the content of the standard prompt email template in question and customize it to fully meet the business requirements?
options: Save as New Template and edit as needed.
Clone the existing template and modify as needed.
Save as New Version and edit as needed.
explanation: El Testing Center en Agentforce Testing Center puede modificar datos CRM en producción si las pruebas se ejecutan en ese entorno, lo cual representa un riesgo real. Por eso se recomienda usar sandboxes para pruebas y comprender que las acciones del agente pueden tener efectos reales.

question:
Universal Containers (UC) is using Einstein Generative AI to generate an account summary. UC aims to ensure the content is safe and inclusive, utilizing the Einstein Trust Layer's toxicity scoring to assess the content's safety level.
What does a safety category score of 1 indicate in the Einstein Generative Al Toxicity Score?
options: Not safe
Safe
Moderately safe
explanation: REST API es la API adecuada para integraciones que requieren llamadas a funciones generativas, como la creación de resúmenes de planes de acción. Metadata API se usa para configuración y SOAP API para integraciones empresariales antiguas, no para funciones de IA generativa.

question:
Universal Containers (UC) wants to offer personalized service experiences and reduce agent handling time with Al-generated email responses, grounded in Knowledge base.
Which AI capability should UC use?
options: Einstein Email Replies
Einstein Service Replies for Email
Einstein Generative Service Replies for Email
explanation: El permission set Read en el objeto custom de Product Replacement es necesario para que el agente pueda consultar y acceder a esos registros. Sin acceso de lectura al objeto personalizado, el agente no puede procesar solicitudes relacionadas con reemplazos de producto.

question: What is the main purpose of Prompt Builder?
options: A tool for developers to use in Visual Studio Code that creates prompts for Apex programming, assisting developers in writing code more efficiently.
A tool that enables companies to create reusable prompts for large language models (LLMs), bringing generative AI responses to their flow of work
A tool within Salesforce offering real-time Al-powered suggestions and guidance to users, Improving productivity and decision-making.
explanation: La causa habitual de que los reps no puedan encontrar el SDR Agent es la falta del permission set Use SDR Agent. Este permission set es el que otorga acceso y visibilidad al agente SDR; sin él, el agente simplemente no aparece para los usuarios.

question:
Universal Containers (UC) is Implementing Service AI Grounding to enhance its customer service operations. UC wants to ensure that its AI generated responses are grounded in the most relevant data sources. The team needs to configure the system to include all supported objects for grounding.
Which objects should UC select to configure Service AI Grounding?
options: Case, Knowledge, and Case Notes
Case and Knowledge
Case, Case Emails, and Knowledge
explanation: Record Snapshots filtra automáticamente los campos vacíos y solo incluye campos con valores en el grounding, lo que reduce el ruido y mejora la relevancia de las respuestas. Activities como tareas y eventos sí pueden estar incluidos, y el email no se excluye por defecto.

question:
Universal Containers (UC) has a mature Salesforce org with a lot of data in cases and Knowledge articles. UC is concerned that there are many legacy fields, with data that might not be applicable for Einstein AI to draft accurate email responses.
Which solution should UC use to ensure Einstein AI can draft responses from a defined data source?
options: Service AI Grounding
Work Summaries
Service Replies
explanation: Field sets son el mecanismo requerido para configurar Record Snapshots grounding, ya que determinan exactamente qué campos se capturan e incluyen en la instantánea del registro. Sin un field set configurado, el grounding no puede determinar qué información incluir.

question:
Universal Containers plans to implement prompt templates that utilize the standard foundation models.
What should the AI Specialist consider when building prompt templates in Prompt Builder?
options: Include multiple-choice questions within the prompt to test the LLM's understanding of the context.
Ask it to role-play as a character in the prompt template to provide more context to the LLM.
Train LLM with data using different writing styles including word choice, intensifiers, emojis, and punctuation.
explanation: El proceso correcto de Prompt Builder incluye seleccionar el tipo de template, desarrollar el prompt en el workspace, seleccionar recursos de grounding con datos CRM, elegir el modelo y validar las respuestas generadas. Las otras opciones mezclan pasos incorrectos o incompletos del proceso.

question:
An AI Specialist at Universal Containers (UC) is tasked with creating a new custom prompt template to populate a field with generated output. UC enabled the Einstein Trust Layer to ensure AI Audit data is captured and monitored for adoption and possible enhancements.
Which prompt template type should the AI Specialist use and which consideration should they review?
options: Flex, and that Dynamic Fields is enabled
Field Generation, and that Dynamic Fields is enabled
Field Generation, and that Dynamic Forms is enabled
explanation: Para resolver un campo requerido faltante en el retriever, se debe actualizar el search index para incluir ese campo. El retriever depende de los campos indexados para recuperar datos; sin actualizar el índice, el campo no estará disponible para el retriever.

question:
Universal Containers needs a tool that can analyze voice and video call records to provide insights on competitor mentions, coaching opportunities, and other key information. The goal is to enhance the team's performance by identifying areas for improvement and competitive intelligence.
Which feature provides insights about competitor mentions and coaching opportunities?
options: Call Summaries
Einstein Sales Insights
Call Explorer
explanation: Cuando las respuestas del agente con PDFs no son satisfactorias, el problema más común es un mapeo incorrecto entre los campos fuente y los objetos de Data Cloud. Revisar el data mapping asegura que la información de los PDFs se interprete y recupere correctamente.

question:
An AI Specialist implements Einstein Sales Emails for a sales team. The team wants to send personalized follow-up emails to leads based on their interactions and data stored in Salesforce. The AI Specialist needs to configure the system to use the most accurate and up-to-date information for email generation.
Which grounding technique should the AI Specialist use?
options: Ground with Apex Merge Fields
Ground with Record Merge Fields
Automatic grounding using Draft with Einstein feature
explanation: El retriever de Data Cloud realiza búsquedas contextuales sobre repositorios indexados para recuperar los documentos más relevantes que fundamentan las respuestas de la IA. No extrae datos brutos ni monitorea calidad; su función es la recuperación semántica para grounding.

question: How should an organization use the Einstein Trust layer to audit, track, and view masked data?
options: Utilize the audit trail that captures and stores all LLM submitted prompts in Data Cloud.
In Setup, use Prompt Builder to send a prompt to the LLM requesting for the masked data.
Access the audit trail in Setup and export all user-generated prompts.
explanation: Einstein Service Replies es la función específica para generar respuestas sugeridas en chats de servicio, basadas en la base de conocimiento de la organización. Einstein Knowledge Recommendations sugiere artículos pero no genera respuestas directas; Einstein Reply Recommendations es para casos de email, no chat.

question: In Model Playground, which hyperparameters of an existing Salesforce-enabled foundational model can an AI Specialist change?
options: Temperature, Frequency Penalty, Presence Penalty
Temperature, Top-k sampling, Presence Penalty
Temperature, Frequency Penalty, Output Tokens
explanation: Definir filtros precisos en el retriever limita el scope de búsqueda y reduce el volumen de datos procesados en cada consulta, minimizando la latencia. Aumentar el recency bias o usar modo dinámico no reduce la latencia y puede incluso aumentarla al requerir procesamiento adicional.

question:
Universal Containers (UC) is implementing Einstein Generative AI to improve customer insights and interactions. UC needs audit and feedback data to be accessible for reporting purposes.
What is a consideration for this requirement?
options: Storing this data requires Data Cloud to be provisioned.
Storing this data requires a custom object for data to be configured.
Storing this data requires Salesforce big objects.
explanation: Prompt Builder requiere el proceso completo: seleccionar el tipo de template, desarrollar en el workspace, agregar recursos de grounding dinámico con datos CRM, seleccionar el modelo y validar. Las otras opciones omiten pasos críticos como la selección del modelo o confunden el proceso con configuraciones incorrectas.

question:
Universal Containers wants to implement a solution in Salesforce with a custom UX that allows users to enter a sales order number. Subsequently, the system will invoke a custom prompt template to create and display a summary of the sales order header and sales order details. 
Which solution should an AI Specialist implement to meet this requirement?
options: Create a screen flow to collect sales order number and invoke the prompt template using the standard "Prompt Template" flow action.
Create a template-triggered prompt flow and invoke the prompt template using the standard “Prompt Template” flow action.
Create an autolaunched flow and invoke the prompt template using the standard “Prompt Template" flow action.
explanation: La acción Answer Questions with Knowledge utiliza Data Cloud para almacenar y gestionar los artículos de Knowledge indexados que el agente recupera para responder preguntas. Data Cloud es el repositorio centralizado que habilita la búsqueda semántica sobre los artículos de Knowledge.

question:
Northern Trail Outfitters (NTO) wants to configure Einstein Trust Layer in its production org but is unable to see the option on the Setup page.
After provisioning Data Cloud, which step must an Al Specialist take to make this option available to NTO?
options: Turn on Einstein Agentforce or copilot .
Turn on Einstein Generative AI.
Turn on Prompt Builder.
explanation: Agentforce Testing Center permite ejecutar pruebas sin consumir Einstein Requests, lo que lo hace ideal para pruebas exhaustivas sin costos adicionales. Sin embargo, las pruebas en producción sí pueden modificar datos CRM reales, por lo que se recomienda usar sandboxes.

question:
Universal Containers (UC) is looking to enhance its operational efficiency. UC has recently adopted Salesforce and is considering implementing Einstein Agentforce or copilot  to improve its processes. 
What is a key reason for implementing Einstein Agentforce or copilot ?
options: Allowing AI to perform tasks without user interaction
Streamlining workflows and automating repetitive tasks
explanation: La razón principal para implementar Einstein Agentforce es agilizar los flujos de trabajo y automatizar tareas repetitivas, mejorando la eficiencia operativa. Agentforce no está diseñado para actuar completamente sin interacción del usuario ni para mejorar la entrada de datos; su valor principal es asistir a los usuarios con capacidades conversacionales e inteligencia artificial.

question:
Universal Containers wants to reduce overall agent handling time by minimizing the time spent typing routine answers for common questions in-chat, and reducing the post-chat analysis by suggesting values for case fields.
Which combination of Einstein for Service features enables this effort?
options: Einstein Service Replies and Work Summaries
Einstein Reply Recommendations and Case Summaries
Einstein Reply Recommendations and Case Classification
explanation: Action Instructions es el parámetro más importante a iterar para asegurar que la acción se seleccione y ejecute correctamente. Las instrucciones definen el comportamiento del agente y cómo el LLM interpreta cuándo y cómo usar la acción.

question: Where should the AI Specialist go to add/update actions assigned to a Agentforce or copilot ?
options: Agentforce or copilot  Actions page, the record page for the Agentforce or copilot  action, or the Agentforce or copilot  Action Library tab
Agentforce or copilot  Actions page or Global Actions
Agentforce or copilot  Detail page, Global Actions, or the record page for the Agentforce or copilot  action
explanation: El reasoning engine identifica los topics y actions apropiados para cada utterance del usuario, actuando como el orquestador principal del agente. No genera respuestas directamente ni realiza consultas de registros; delega esas tareas a las actions correspondientes.

question:
Universal Containers implemented Einstein Agentforce or copilot  for its users. One user complains that Einstein Agentforce or copilot  is not deleting activities from the past 7 days.
What is the reason for this issue?
options: Einstein Agentforce or copilot  Delete Record Action permission is not associated to the user.
Einstein Agentforce or copilot  does not have the permission to delete the user's records.
Einstein Agentforce or copilot  does not support the Delete Record action.
explanation: Revisar las Action Instructions es el primer paso para resolver conflictos entre acciones similares, ya que instrucciones ambiguas hacen que el LLM no pueda diferenciar correctamente entre ellas. Instrucciones claras y distintas para cada tipo de resumen aseguran la selección correcta.

question:
An AI Specialist has created a Agentforce or copilot  custom action using flow as the reference action type. However, it is not delivering the expected results to the conversation preview, and therefore needs troubleshooting.
What should the AI Specialist do to identify the root cause of the problem?
options: In Agentforce or copilot  Builder within the Dynamic Panel, turn on dynamic debugging to show the inputs and outputs.
In Agentforce or copilot  Builder within the Dynamic Panel, confirm selected action and observe the values in Input and Output sections.
In Agentforce or copilot  Builder, verify the utterance entered by the user and review session event logs for debug information.
explanation: Cuando los emails generados contienen marcadores de posición en lugar de valores reales, generalmente significa que el usuario no tiene permisos de acceso a los campos del registro del destinatario. La falta de permiso impide que el sistema sustituya los placeholders con datos reales del CRM.

question:
A service agent is looking at a custom object that stores travel information. They recently received a weather alert and now need to cancel flights for the customers that are related with this itinerary. The service agent needs to review the Knowledge articles about canceling and rebooking the customer flights.
Which Einstein Agentforce or copilot  capability helps the agent accomplish this?
options: Execute tasks based on available actions, answering questions using information from accessible Knowledge articles.
Invoke a flow which makes a call to external data to create a Knowledge article.
Generate a Knowledge article based off the prompts that the agent enters to create steps to cancel flights.
explanation: Agentforce puede ejecutar tareas basadas en las acciones disponibles y responder preguntas usando artículos de Knowledge accesibles, lo que le permite al agente de servicio cancelar vuelos y consultar artículos de Knowledge simultáneamente. Las otras opciones describen capacidades más limitadas o incorrectas del agente.

question: What is the role of the large language model (LLM) in executing an Einstein Agentforce or copilot  Action?
options: Find similar requests and provide actions that need to be executed
Identify the best matching actions and correct order of execution
Determine a user's access and sort actions by priority to be executed
explanation: El LLM identifica las acciones más relevantes y el orden óptimo de ejecución para satisfacer la solicitud del usuario. No busca solicitudes similares ni determina permisos de acceso; su rol es la planificación y selección inteligente de acciones.

question:
Universal Containers (UC) wants to enable its sales team to get insights into product and competitor names mentioned during calls. 
How should UC meet this requirement?
options: Enable Einstein Conversation Insights, assign permission sets, define recording managers, and customize insights with up to 50 competitor names.
Enable Einstein Conversation Insights, connect a recording provider, assign permission sets, and customize insights with up to 25 products.
Enable Einstein Conversation Insights, enable sales recording, assign permission sets, and customize insights with up to 50 products.
explanation: Para habilitar Einstein Conversation Insights con análisis de competidores y productos, se debe conectar un proveedor de grabación, asignar permission sets y personalizar los insights con hasta 25 productos. El límite es 25 productos (no 50) y se requiere un proveedor de grabación externo.

question: How does the Einstein Trust Layer ensure that sensitive data is protected while generating useful and meaningful responses?
options: Masked data will be de-masked during response journey.
Masked data will be de-masked during request journey.
Responses that do not meet the relevance threshold will be automatically rejected.
explanation: En el Einstein Trust Layer, los datos enmascarados se enmascaran durante el viaje de request (antes de enviar al LLM) y se desenmascaran durante el viaje de response (al devolver la respuesta al usuario). Esto protege los datos sensibles mientras mantiene la utilidad de las respuestas generadas.

question:
Universal Containers wants to utilize Einstein for Sales to help sales reps reach their sales quotas by providing Al-generated plans containing guidance and steps for closing deals. 
Which feature should the AI Specialist recommend to the sales team?
options: Find Similar Deals
Create Account Plan
Create Close Plan
explanation: Create Close Plan es la función de Einstein for Sales que genera planes con orientación y pasos específicos para cerrar oportunidades. Find Similar Deals busca deals parecidos y Create Account Plan es para planes de cuenta, no para guías de cierre de oportunidades específicas.

question:
A Salesforce Administrator is exploring the capabilities of Einstein Agentforce or copilot  to enhance user interaction within their organization. They are particularly interested in how Einstein Agentforce or copilot  processes user requests and the mechanism it employs to deliver responses. The administrator is evaluating whether Einstein Agentforce or copilot  directly interfaces with a large language model (LLM) to fetch and display responses to user inquiries, facilitating a broad range of requests from users. 
How does Einstein Agentforce or copilot  handle user requests In Salesforce?
options: Einstein Agentforce or copilot  will trigger a flow that utilizes a prompt template to generate the message.
Einstein Agentforce or copilot  will perform an HTTP callout to an LLM provider.
Einstein Agentforce or copilot  analyzes the user's request and LLM technology is used to generate and display the appropriate response.
explanation: Agentforce analiza la solicitud del usuario y usa tecnología LLM para generar y mostrar la respuesta apropiada, actuando como una capa inteligente sobre el LLM. No hace HTTP callouts directos al LLM ni simplemente dispara flows; procesa la solicitud de forma integrada en la plataforma.

question:
An administrator is responsible for ensuring the security and reliability of Universal Containers' (UC) CRM data. UC needs enhanced data protection and up-to-date AI capabilities. UC also needs to include relevant information from a Salesforce record to be merged with the prompt. 
Which feature in the Einstein Trust Layer best supports UC's need?
options: Data masking
Dynamic grounding with secure data retrieval
Zero-data retention policy
explanation: Dynamic grounding with secure data retrieval en el Einstein Trust Layer permite incluir información de registros de Salesforce en el prompt de forma segura, protegiendo datos sensibles. Data masking oculta datos pero no los incluye dinámicamente; zero-data retention solo controla la retención.

question:
An AI Specialist built a Field Generation prompt template that worked for many records, but users are reporting random failures with token limit errors. 
What is the cause of the random nature of this error?
options: The number of tokens generated by the dynamic nature of the prompt template will vary by record.
The template type needs to be switched to Flex to accommodate the variable amount of tokens generated by the prompt grounding.
The number of tokens that can be processed by the LLM varies with total user demand.
explanation: Los errores de token limit son aleatorios porque el número de tokens generados varía según el contenido dinámico del registro procesado; algunos registros tienen más datos que otros. El template no es el problema ni la demanda del LLM; es la variabilidad inherente de los datos de cada registro.

question:
Universal Containers’ data science team is hosting a generative large language model (LLM) on Amazon Web Services (AWS). 
What should the team use to access externally-hosted models in the Salesforce Platform?
options: Model Builder
App Builder
Agentforce or copilot  Builder
explanation: Model Builder es la herramienta de Salesforce para conectar y gestionar modelos LLM externos alojados en plataformas como AWS. App Builder es para interfaces de usuario y Agentforce Builder es para configurar agentes, no para registrar modelos externos en la plataforma.

question:
Universal Containers’ current AI data masking rules do not align with organizational privacy and security policies and requirements. 
What should an AI Specialist recommend to resolve the issue?
options: Enable data masking for sandbox refreshes.
Configure data masking in the Einstein Trust Layer setup.
Add new data masking rules in LLM setup.
explanation: Para actualizar las reglas de enmascaramiento de datos de la IA, se deben configurar en el setup del Einstein Trust Layer. Las opciones de sandbox refresh o LLM setup no son los lugares correctos para gestionar las políticas de data masking en el contexto de la IA de Salesforce.

question: What is an AI Specialist able to do when the “Enrich event logs with conversation data" setting in Einstein Agentforce or copilot  is enabled?
options: View the user click path that led to each Agentforce or copilot  action.
View session data including user Input and Agentforce or copilot  responses for sessions over the past 7 days.
Generate details reports on all Agentforce or copilot  conversations over any time period.
explanation: Al habilitar 'Enrich event logs with conversation data', el especialista puede ver los datos de sesión incluyendo inputs del usuario y respuestas del agente de los últimos 7 días. No se puede ver el click path completo del usuario ni generar informes históricos ilimitados con esta configuración.

question:
Universal Containers wants to make a sales proposal and directly use data from multiple unrelated objects (standard and custom) in a prompt template. 
What should the AI Specialist recommend?
options: Create a Flex template to add resources with standard and custom objects as inputs.
Create a prompt template passing in a special custom object that connects the records temporarily,
Create a prompt template-triggered flow to access the data from standard and custom objects.
explanation: Un Flex Template permite agregar múltiples recursos de objetos estándar y personalizados como inputs, siendo la solución correcta para prompts que necesitan datos de objetos no relacionados. Las plantillas estándar están limitadas a un objeto base y no admiten múltiples fuentes de datos independientes.

question:
Universal Containers is considering leveraging the Einstein Trust Layer in conjunction with Einstein Generative AI Audit Data. 
Which audit data is available using the Einstein Trust Layer?
options: Response accuracy and offensiveness score
Hallucination score and bias score
Masked data and toxicity score
explanation: El Einstein Trust Layer proporciona datos de auditoría que incluyen datos enmascarados y puntuación de toxicidad, no métricas de precisión de respuesta ni puntuaciones de alucinación. Estos datos de auditoría permiten revisar qué información fue procesada y filtrada durante las interacciones de IA.

question:
Universal Containers (UC) is experimenting with using public Generative AI models and is familiar with the language required to get the information it needs. However, it can be time consuming for both UC's sales and service reps to type in the prompt to get the information they need, and ensure prompt consistency.
Which Salesforce feature should a Salesforce AI Specialist recommend to address these concerns?
options: Einstein Recommendation Builder
Einstein Agentforce or copilot  Action: Query Records
Einstein Prompt Builder and Prompt Templates
explanation: Einstein Prompt Builder con Prompt Templates es la solución para estandarizar y reutilizar prompts complejos, evitando que los usuarios tengan que escribirlos manualmente cada vez. Esto garantiza consistencia en los prompts y ahorra tiempo a los equipos de ventas y servicio.

question:
An AI Specialist needs to create a Sales Email with a custom prompt template. They need to ground on the following data:
- Opportunity Products
- Events near the customer
- Tone and voice examples
How should the AI Specialist obtain related items?
options: Call a prompt initiated flow to fetch and ground the required data.
Create a flex template that takes the records in question as inputs.
Utilize a standard email template and manually insert the required data fields.
explanation: Llamar a un flow iniciado por prompt permite obtener datos relacionados como Opportunity Products, eventos externos y ejemplos de tono que no están directamente disponibles como merge fields estándar. Un Flex template requiere que los objetos sean inputs directos, no datos relacionados complejos.

question:
Universal Containers (UC) wants to create a new Sales Email prompt template in Prompt Builder using the "Save As" function. However, UC notices that the new template produces different results compared to the standard Sales Email prompt due to missing hyperparameters.
What should UC do to ensure the new prompt template produces results comparable to the standard Sales Email prompts?
options: Use Model Playground to create a model configuration with the specified parameters.
Manually add the hyperparameters to the new template.
Revert to using the standard template without modifications.
explanation: Al usar 'Save As' en Prompt Builder, los hiperparámetros del template original no se copian automáticamente al nuevo template. La solución es agregar manualmente los hiperparámetros al nuevo template para que produzca resultados comparables al estándar.

question:
An AI Specialist is tasked with creating a prompt template for a sales team. The template needs to generate a summary of all related opportunities for a given Account.
Which grounding technique should the AI Specialist use to include data from the related list of opportunities in the prompt template?
options: Use formula fields to reference the Einstein related list of opportunities.
Use merge fields to reference the default related list of opportunities.
Use the merge fields to reference a custom related list of opportunities.
explanation: Para incluir datos de la lista relacionada de oportunidades en un prompt template, se deben usar merge fields que referencien la related list de oportunidades predeterminada. Las fórmulas no son el mecanismo correcto para este tipo de grounding dinámico con datos relacionados.

question:
An AI Specialist is tasked with configuring a generative model to create personalized sales emails using customer data stored in Salesforce. The AI Specialist has already fine-tuned a large language model (LLM) on the OpenAI platform. Security and data privacy are critical concerns for the client.
How should the AI Specialist integrate the custom LLM into Salesforce?
options: Add the fine-tuned LLM in Einstein Studio Model Builder.
Enable model endpoint on OpenAl and make callouts to the model to generate emails.
Create an application of the custom LLM and embed it in Sales Cloud via iFrame.
explanation: Para integrar un LLM personalizado fine-tuneado en OpenAI a Salesforce de forma segura, se debe usar Einstein Studio Model Builder para registrar y gestionar el modelo externo. Hacer callouts directos a OpenAI o incrustar con iFrame no proporciona las garantías de seguridad y control del Trust Layer.

question:
Universal Containers (UC) uses Salesforce Service Cloud to support its customers and agents handling cases. UC is considering implementing Einstein Agentforce or copilot  and extending Service Cloud to mobile users. 
When would Einstein Agentforce or copilot  implementation be most advantageous?
options: When the goal is to streamline customer support processes and improve response times
When the main objective is to enhance data security and compliance measures
When the focus is on optimizing marketing campaigns and strategies
explanation: Einstein Agentforce es más ventajoso cuando el objetivo es agilizar los procesos de soporte al cliente y mejorar los tiempos de respuesta, no para seguridad de datos ni optimización de marketing. Su valor principal está en la automatización inteligente de interacciones de servicio al cliente.

question:
An AI Specialist needs to create a prompt template to fill a custom field named Latest Opportunities Summary on the Account object with information from the three most recently opened opportunities.
How should the AI Specialist gather the necessary data for the prompt template?
options: Create a flow to retrieve the opportunity information.
Select the Account Opportunity object as a resource when creating the prompt template.
Select the latest Opportunities related list as a merge field.
explanation: Para obtener datos de las tres oportunidades más recientes de una cuenta en un prompt template, crear un flow es la técnica correcta, ya que permite recuperar registros relacionados con lógica de ordenamiento y límites. Los merge fields estándar no permiten este nivel de control sobre registros relacionados.

question:
A data scientist needs to view and manage models in Einstein Studio. The data scientist also needs to create prompt templates in Prompt Builder.
Which permission sets should an AI Specialist assign to the data scientist?
options: Data Cloud Admin and Prompt Template Manager
Prompt Template Manager and Prompt Template User
Prompt Template User and Data Cloud Admin
explanation: Data Cloud Admin permite ver y gestionar modelos en Einstein Studio, mientras que Prompt Template Manager permite crear y administrar prompt templates en Prompt Builder. Estos dos permission sets juntos cubren ambos requisitos del data scientist.

question:
An AI Specialist configured Data Masking within the Einstein Trust Layer.
How should the AI Specialist begin validating that the correct fields are being masked?
options: Use a Flow-based resource in Prompt Builder to debug the fields’ merge values using Flow Debugger.
Request the Einstein Generative AI Audit Data from the Security section of the Setup menu.
Enable the collection and storage of Einstein Generative AI Audit Data on the Einstein Feedback setup page.
explanation: Agentforce Data Library es más útil cuando el agente necesita responder basándose en un conjunto curado de documentos de políticas que se almacenan, actualizan regularmente e indexan. Es la solución ideal para bases de conocimiento internas que requieren búsqueda semántica y grounding confiable.

question:
Universal Containers (UC) recently rolled out Einstein Generative Al capabilities and has created a custom prompt to summarize case records. Users have reported that the case summaries generated are not returning the appropriate information.
What is a possible explanation for the poor prompt performance?
options: The data being used for grounding Is incorrect or incomplete.
The prompt template version is incompatible with the chosen LLM.
The Einstein Trust Layer is incorrectly configured.
explanation: Tanto change sets como Salesforce CLI/Metadata API pueden utilizarse para desplegar flows, Apex y todos los metadatos relacionados con el agente de forma completa y consistente. No es necesario recrear manualmente los componentes del agente en producción ni limitarse a un solo método de despliegue.

question: What is best practice when refining Einstein Agentforce or copilot  custom action instructions?
options: Provide examples of user messages that are expected to trigger the action.
Use consistent introductory phrases and verbs across multiple action instructions.
Specify the persona who will request the action.
